item.title: Nikon D500 Cheat Sheet
item.description: Disclaimer: This sheet is being continuously updated. Quick Reference: Astrophotography: EM: M or bulb SS: 10” (higher allows for longer exposure, but obey the 500 rule. f/stop: 1.8 ISO: 1600 Enable live view on camera, focus on brightest object possible. (Use highest possible shutter speed & ISO values here). Exposure Mode: P (Program): D500 selects basic exposure settings, but allows for user modification of all values while still maintaining metered exposure (different light values for different areas of image depending on relative brightness) S (Shutter-priority): Useful to modify shutter speed to create either blur or exposure effects.

item.title: Notes
item.description: Physics and Science Good Theoretical Physicist
